description: Run-scoped BotLens root-cause dashboard. Assumes portal_bot_run_lifecycle plus observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1, observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1, and Loki backend logs are available. Panels intentionally stay blank until a concrete run_id is selected.

options.content: Select a concrete `run_id` to populate this dashboard. When `run_id` is left on `Select run_id...`, all RCA panels intentionally return no data so you do not see misleading multi-run aggregates.

panels.title: Run Status

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN '${run_id}' = '__none__' THEN 'Select run_id' ELSE COALESCE((SELECT CONCAT(COALESCE(l.status, 'unknown'), CASE WHEN COALESCE(l.phase, '') <> '' THEN ' • ' || l.phase ELSE '' END) FROM portal_bot_run_lifecycle l WHERE l.run_id = '${run_id}' LIMIT 1), (SELECT COALESCE(r.status, 'unknown') FROM portal_bot_runs r WHERE r.run_id = '${run_id}' LIMIT 1), 'missing') END AS value;

panels.description: Latest durable lifecycle state for the selected run.

panels.title: Active Viewers

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN '${run_id}' = '__none__' THEN NULL::double precision ELSE COALESCE((SELECT m.value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name = 'viewer_active_count' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') ORDER BY m.observed_at DESC LIMIT 1), 0)::double precision END AS value;

panels.description: Latest active viewer count for this run.

panels.title: Send Failures

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN '${run_id}' = '__none__' THEN NULL::double precision ELSE COALESCE(sum(m.value), 0)::double precision END AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE '${run_id}' <> '__none__' AND $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name = 'viewer_send_fail_total' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}');

panels.description: Total viewer send failures for the selected run and drilldowns.

panels.title: Dropped Events

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN '${run_id}' = '__none__' THEN NULL::double precision ELSE COALESCE(sum(m.value), 0)::double precision END AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE '${run_id}' <> '__none__' AND $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('telemetry_enqueue_drop_total', 'symbol_fact_dropped_total', 'run_lifecycle_dropped_total', 'run_notification_dropped_total', 'fanout_dropped_total') AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}');

panels.description: Total dropped events across the run path queues.

panels.title: Worst Queue Utilization

targets.rawSql: WITH scoped AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN m.metric_name = 'symbol_fact_queue_utilization' THEN 'symbol_fact_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'run_lifecycle_queue_utilization' THEN 'run_lifecycle_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'run_notification_queue_utilization' THEN 'run_notification_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'fanout_queue_utilization' THEN 'fanout_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'bootstrap_pending_count' THEN 'bootstrap_pending_slot' ELSE COALESCE(m.queue_name, m.metric_name) END AS queue_name, COALESCE(m.series_key, '') AS series_key, m.observed_at, m.value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE '${run_id}' <> '__none__' AND $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('symbol_fact_queue_utilization', 'run_lifecycle_queue_utilization', 'run_notification_queue_utilization', 'fanout_queue_utilization', 'bootstrap_pending_count') AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') ), latest AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (queue_name, series_key) queue_name, series_key, value FROM scoped ORDER BY queue_name, series_key, observed_at DESC ) SELECT CASE WHEN '${run_id}' = '__none__' THEN NULL::double precision ELSE ROUND((COALESCE(max(value), 0) * 100.0)::numeric, 2)::double precision END AS value FROM latest;

panels.description: Highest latest queue utilization or bootstrap slot occupancy for the selected run.

panels.title: Worst Queue Oldest Age

targets.rawSql: WITH scoped AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN m.metric_name = 'symbol_fact_queue_oldest_age_ms' THEN 'symbol_fact_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'run_lifecycle_queue_oldest_age_ms' THEN 'run_lifecycle_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'run_notification_queue_oldest_age_ms' THEN 'run_notification_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'fanout_queue_oldest_age_ms' THEN 'fanout_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'bootstrap_pending_age_ms' THEN 'bootstrap_pending_slot' ELSE COALESCE(m.queue_name, m.metric_name) END AS queue_name, COALESCE(m.series_key, '') AS series_key, m.observed_at, m.value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE '${run_id}' <> '__none__' AND $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('symbol_fact_queue_oldest_age_ms', 'run_lifecycle_queue_oldest_age_ms', 'run_notification_queue_oldest_age_ms', 'fanout_queue_oldest_age_ms', 'bootstrap_pending_age_ms') AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') ), latest AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (queue_name, series_key) queue_name, series_key, value FROM scoped ORDER BY queue_name, series_key, observed_at DESC ) SELECT CASE WHEN '${run_id}' = '__none__' THEN NULL::double precision ELSE ROUND(COALESCE(max(value), 0)::numeric, 2)::double precision END AS value FROM latest;

panels.description: Highest latest oldest-pending age across the run queues and bootstrap slot.

panels.title: End-to-End Latency Stack p95

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN m.metric_name = 'telemetry_queue_wait_ms' THEN 'telemetry_queue_wait_ms' WHEN m.metric_name = 'symbol_projector_apply_ms' THEN 'symbol_projector_apply_ms' WHEN m.metric_name = 'run_projector_apply_ms' THEN 'run_projector_apply_ms' WHEN m.metric_name = 'fanout_delivery_ms' THEN 'fanout_delivery_ms' WHEN m.metric_name = 'viewer_send_ms' THEN 'viewer_send_ms' WHEN m.metric_name = 'persistence_wait_ms' THEN 'persistence_wait_ms' WHEN m.metric_name = 'db_write_ms' THEN 'db_write_ms' WHEN m.metric_name = 'viewer_snapshot_total_ms' THEN 'viewer_snapshot_total_ms' ELSE m.metric_name END AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('telemetry_queue_wait_ms', 'symbol_projector_apply_ms', 'run_projector_apply_ms', 'fanout_delivery_ms', 'viewer_send_ms', 'persistence_wait_ms', 'db_write_ms', 'viewer_snapshot_total_ms') AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Run-scoped p95 latency stack across queueing, projection, fanout, delivery, snapshot, and persistence.

panels.title: End-to-End Latency Stack p99

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN m.metric_name = 'telemetry_queue_wait_ms' THEN 'telemetry_queue_wait_ms' WHEN m.metric_name = 'symbol_projector_apply_ms' THEN 'symbol_projector_apply_ms' WHEN m.metric_name = 'run_projector_apply_ms' THEN 'run_projector_apply_ms' WHEN m.metric_name = 'fanout_delivery_ms' THEN 'fanout_delivery_ms' WHEN m.metric_name = 'viewer_send_ms' THEN 'viewer_send_ms' WHEN m.metric_name = 'persistence_wait_ms' THEN 'persistence_wait_ms' WHEN m.metric_name = 'db_write_ms' THEN 'db_write_ms' WHEN m.metric_name = 'viewer_snapshot_total_ms' THEN 'viewer_snapshot_total_ms' ELSE m.metric_name END AS metric, percentile_cont(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('telemetry_queue_wait_ms', 'symbol_projector_apply_ms', 'run_projector_apply_ms', 'fanout_delivery_ms', 'viewer_send_ms', 'persistence_wait_ms', 'db_write_ms', 'viewer_snapshot_total_ms') AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Run-scoped p99 latency stack to expose burstiness and tail jitter.

panels.title: Queue Depth

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN m.metric_name = 'symbol_fact_queue_depth' THEN 'symbol_fact_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'run_lifecycle_queue_depth' THEN 'run_lifecycle_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'run_notification_queue_depth' THEN 'run_notification_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'fanout_queue_depth' THEN 'fanout_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'bootstrap_pending_count' THEN 'bootstrap_pending_slot' ELSE COALESCE(m.queue_name, m.metric_name) END AS metric, avg(m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('symbol_fact_queue_depth', 'run_lifecycle_queue_depth', 'run_notification_queue_depth', 'fanout_queue_depth', 'bootstrap_pending_count') AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Queue depth and bootstrap pending occupancy for the selected run.

panels.title: Queue Utilization / Occupancy

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN m.metric_name = 'symbol_fact_queue_utilization' THEN 'symbol_fact_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'run_lifecycle_queue_utilization' THEN 'run_lifecycle_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'run_notification_queue_utilization' THEN 'run_notification_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'fanout_queue_utilization' THEN 'fanout_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'bootstrap_pending_count' THEN 'bootstrap_pending_slot' ELSE COALESCE(m.queue_name, m.metric_name) END AS metric, avg(m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('symbol_fact_queue_utilization', 'run_lifecycle_queue_utilization', 'run_notification_queue_utilization', 'fanout_queue_utilization', 'bootstrap_pending_count') AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Utilization for bounded queues; bootstrap slot is shown as occupancy.

panels.title: Queue Oldest Age

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN m.metric_name = 'symbol_fact_queue_oldest_age_ms' THEN 'symbol_fact_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'run_lifecycle_queue_oldest_age_ms' THEN 'run_lifecycle_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'run_notification_queue_oldest_age_ms' THEN 'run_notification_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'fanout_queue_oldest_age_ms' THEN 'fanout_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'bootstrap_pending_age_ms' THEN 'bootstrap_pending_slot' ELSE COALESCE(m.queue_name, m.metric_name) END AS metric, avg(m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('symbol_fact_queue_oldest_age_ms', 'run_lifecycle_queue_oldest_age_ms', 'run_notification_queue_oldest_age_ms', 'fanout_queue_oldest_age_ms', 'bootstrap_pending_age_ms') AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Oldest pending item age or bootstrap pending age for the selected run.

panels.title: Queue Wait p95

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN m.metric_name = 'symbol_fact_queue_wait_ms' THEN 'symbol_fact_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'run_lifecycle_queue_wait_ms' THEN 'run_lifecycle_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'run_notification_queue_wait_ms' THEN 'run_notification_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'fanout_queue_wait_ms' THEN 'fanout_queue' ELSE COALESCE(m.queue_name, m.metric_name) END AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('symbol_fact_queue_wait_ms', 'run_lifecycle_queue_wait_ms', 'run_notification_queue_wait_ms', 'fanout_queue_wait_ms') AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: p95 queue wait for queues that expose wait-time metrics.

panels.title: Drops / Overflow / Supersedes

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN m.metric_name = 'symbol_fact_dropped_total' THEN 'symbol_fact_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'run_lifecycle_dropped_total' THEN 'run_lifecycle_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'run_notification_dropped_total' THEN 'run_notification_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'fanout_dropped_total' THEN 'fanout_queue' WHEN m.metric_name = 'bootstrap_superseded_total' THEN 'bootstrap_pending_slot' ELSE COALESCE(m.queue_name, m.metric_name) END AS metric, sum(m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('symbol_fact_dropped_total', 'run_lifecycle_dropped_total', 'run_notification_dropped_total', 'fanout_dropped_total', 'bootstrap_superseded_total') AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Run-scoped drop, overflow-side-effect, and bootstrap supersede counts.

panels.title: Ingress / Projection Throughput

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN m.metric_name = 'telemetry_emitted_total' THEN 'telemetry_emitted' WHEN m.metric_name = 'ingest_messages_total' THEN 'ingest_messages' WHEN m.metric_name = 'symbol_fact_enqueued_total' THEN 'symbol_fact_enqueues' WHEN m.metric_name = 'run_lifecycle_enqueued_total' THEN 'run_lifecycle_enqueues' WHEN m.metric_name = 'run_notification_enqueued_total' THEN 'run_notification_enqueues' WHEN m.metric_name IN ('symbol_projector_bootstrap_apply_total', 'symbol_projector_fact_apply_total') THEN 'symbol_projector_applies' WHEN m.metric_name IN ('run_projector_lifecycle_apply_total', 'run_projector_notification_apply_total', 'run_projector_terminal_total') THEN 'run_projector_applies' ELSE m.metric_name END AS metric, sum(m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('telemetry_emitted_total', 'ingest_messages_total', 'symbol_fact_enqueued_total', 'run_lifecycle_enqueued_total', 'run_notification_enqueued_total', 'symbol_projector_bootstrap_apply_total', 'symbol_projector_fact_apply_total', 'run_projector_lifecycle_apply_total', 'run_projector_notification_apply_total', 'run_projector_terminal_total') AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Telemetry, ingest, enqueues, and projector apply totals for the selected run.

panels.title: Fanout / Delivery / Persistence Throughput

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN m.metric_name = 'fanout_enqueued_total' THEN 'fanout_enqueues' WHEN m.metric_name = 'fanout_delivery_items_total' THEN 'fanout_delivery_items' WHEN m.metric_name = 'viewer_broadcast_total' THEN 'viewer_broadcasts' WHEN m.metric_name = 'viewer_send_total' THEN 'viewer_sends' WHEN m.metric_name = 'db_write_total' THEN 'db_writes' ELSE m.metric_name END AS metric, sum(m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('fanout_enqueued_total', 'fanout_delivery_items_total', 'viewer_broadcast_total', 'viewer_send_total', 'db_write_total') AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Fanout, viewer delivery, and DB write throughput for this run.

panels.title: Snapshot / Bootstrap Latency p95

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN m.metric_name = 'viewer_snapshot_load_ms' THEN 'viewer_snapshot_load_ms' WHEN m.metric_name = 'viewer_snapshot_total_ms' THEN 'viewer_snapshot_total_ms' WHEN m.metric_name = 'run_projector_initial_state_load_ms' THEN 'run_projector_initial_state_load_ms' WHEN m.metric_name = 'db_initial_load_ms' THEN 'db_initial_load_ms' ELSE m.metric_name END AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('viewer_snapshot_load_ms', 'viewer_snapshot_total_ms', 'run_projector_initial_state_load_ms', 'db_initial_load_ms') AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Snapshot load/total plus bootstrap or initial-state load latency.

panels.title: Snapshot / Bootstrap Event Counts

targets.rawSql: SELECT e.event_name AS metric, count(*)::double precision AS value FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.observed_at) AND e.event_name IN ('bootstrap_received', 'bootstrap_superseded', 'bootstrap_applied', 'initial_state_load_started', 'initial_state_load_completed', 'initial_state_load_failed', 'viewer_snapshot_started', 'viewer_snapshot_sent', 'viewer_snapshot_load_failed', 'viewer_snapshot_buffer_overflow') AND COALESCE(e.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(e.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC;

panels.description: Structured snapshot/bootstrap events for the selected run.

panels.title: Pending / Replay / Buffer State

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN m.metric_name = 'snapshot_pending_viewers' THEN 'snapshot_pending_viewers' WHEN m.metric_name = 'snapshot_buffered_deltas' THEN 'snapshot_buffered_deltas' WHEN m.metric_name = 'snapshot_replay_count' THEN 'snapshot_replay_count' WHEN m.metric_name = 'bootstrap_pending_count' THEN 'bootstrap_pending_count' WHEN m.metric_name = 'bootstrap_superseded_total' THEN 'bootstrap_superseded_total' ELSE m.metric_name END AS metric, CASE WHEN m.metric_name IN ('snapshot_replay_count', 'bootstrap_superseded_total') THEN sum(m.value)::double precision ELSE avg(m.value)::double precision END AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('snapshot_pending_viewers', 'snapshot_buffered_deltas', 'snapshot_replay_count', 'bootstrap_pending_count', 'bootstrap_superseded_total') AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1, 2, m.metric_name ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Snapshot replay counts plus pending/buffer gauges and bootstrap slot activity.

panels.title: Viewer Delivery Totals

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN m.metric_name = 'fanout_delivery_items_total' THEN 'fanout_delivery_items' WHEN m.metric_name = 'viewer_broadcast_total' THEN 'viewer_broadcasts' WHEN m.metric_name = 'viewer_send_total' THEN 'viewer_sends' WHEN m.metric_name = 'viewer_send_fail_total' THEN 'viewer_send_failures' ELSE m.metric_name END AS metric, sum(m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('fanout_delivery_items_total', 'viewer_broadcast_total', 'viewer_send_total', 'viewer_send_fail_total') AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Viewer send totals, failures, and upstream fanout delivery volume.

panels.title: Viewer Send Latency p95

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), 'viewer_send_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name = 'viewer_send_ms' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: p95 viewer send latency for the selected run.

panels.title: Send Failures By Failure Mode

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(m.failure_mode, 'unknown') AS metric, ROUND(sum(m.value)::numeric, 2)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name = 'viewer_send_fail_total' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 12;

panels.description: Failure-mode breakdown for run-scoped viewer send failures.

panels.title: Persistence vs DB Latency p95

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN m.metric_name = 'persistence_wait_ms' THEN 'persistence_wait_ms' WHEN m.metric_name = 'db_write_ms' THEN 'db_write_ms' WHEN m.metric_name = 'db_initial_load_ms' THEN 'db_initial_load_ms' ELSE m.metric_name END AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('persistence_wait_ms', 'db_write_ms', 'db_initial_load_ms') AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Shows total persistence-induced blocking versus actual DB write or DB load latency.

panels.title: DB Outcomes / No-op Counts

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN m.metric_name = 'db_write_total' THEN 'db_write_total' WHEN m.metric_name = 'db_write_fail_total' THEN 'db_write_fail_total' WHEN m.metric_name = 'db_write_retry_total' THEN 'db_write_retry_total' WHEN m.metric_name = 'db_duplicate_skip_total' THEN 'db_duplicate_skip_total' WHEN m.metric_name = 'db_stale_update_total' THEN 'db_stale_update_total' ELSE m.metric_name END AS metric, sum(m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('db_write_total', 'db_write_fail_total', 'db_write_retry_total', 'db_duplicate_skip_total', 'db_stale_update_total') AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: DB writes, retries, failures, duplicate skips, and stale-update no-ops over time.

panels.title: Persistence Wait By Component / Storage

targets.rawSql: SELECT CONCAT(COALESCE(NULLIF(m.component, ''), 'unknown'), ' • ', COALESCE(NULLIF(m.storage_target, ''), 'none')) AS metric, ROUND((percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY m.value))::numeric, 2)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name = 'persistence_wait_ms' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 12;

panels.description: Ranks persistence blocking by component and storage target to separate DB-bound from pipeline-bound delay.

panels.title: Structured Run Event Timeline

targets.rawSql: SELECT e.observed_at AS "Time", e.level, e.event_name, e.series_key, e.component, e.queue_name, e.storage_target, e.failure_mode, COALESCE(e.message, e.details::text, '') AS detail FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.observed_at) AND e.event_name IN ('telemetry_backpressure_entered', 'telemetry_backpressure_recovered', 'telemetry_transport_connection_lost', 'telemetry_transport_connection_restored', 'telemetry_transport_send_failed', 'telemetry_transport_retry_scheduled', 'symbol_fact_queue_overflow', 'run_lifecycle_queue_overflow_dropped_oldest', 'run_notification_queue_overflow', 'fanout_channel_overflow', 'bootstrap_received', 'bootstrap_superseded', 'bootstrap_applied', 'initial_state_load_started', 'initial_state_load_completed', 'initial_state_load_failed', 'viewer_snapshot_started', 'viewer_snapshot_sent', 'viewer_snapshot_load_failed', 'viewer_snapshot_buffer_overflow', 'run_phase_changed', 'run_terminal_detected', 'run_evicted', 'viewer_send_failed', 'fanout_delivery_error', 'db_write_failed', 'db_write_retried', 'db_write_slow', 'db_seq_collision') AND COALESCE(e.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(e.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') ORDER BY e.observed_at DESC LIMIT 150;

panels.description: Run-scoped structured event timeline focused on pressure, snapshot, lifecycle, delivery, and persistence anomalies.

panels.title: Run Warning / Error Logs
panels.description: Relevant warning/error backend logs filtered to the selected run.

panels.title: Queue Overflow Events

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(count(*), 0)::double precision AS value FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.observed_at) AND e.event_name IN ('symbol_fact_queue_overflow', 'run_lifecycle_queue_overflow_dropped_oldest', 'run_notification_queue_overflow', 'fanout_channel_overflow', 'viewer_snapshot_buffer_overflow') AND COALESCE(e.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(e.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}');

panels.description: Queue or buffer overflow events in the selected time range.

panels.title: Drop Counts

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(sum(m.value), 0)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('telemetry_enqueue_drop_total', 'symbol_fact_dropped_total', 'run_lifecycle_dropped_total', 'run_notification_dropped_total', 'fanout_dropped_total') AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}');

panels.description: Dropped event counts across the selected run path.

panels.title: Retry Counts

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(sum(m.value), 0)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('db_write_retry_total', 'telemetry_transport_retries_total') AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}');

panels.description: Retry counts from DB writes and transport retries.

panels.title: DB Failure Counts

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(sum(m.value), 0)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name = 'db_write_fail_total' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}');

panels.description: Total DB write failures in the selected range.

panels.title: Snapshot Load Failures

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(count(*), 0)::double precision AS value FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.observed_at) AND e.event_name IN ('viewer_snapshot_load_failed', 'db_initial_state_load_failed', 'initial_state_load_failed') AND COALESCE(e.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(e.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}');

panels.description: Snapshot and initial-state load failures for the selected run.

panels.title: Deprecated / Unknown Kinds

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(sum(m.value), 0)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name = 'ingest_messages_unknown_kind_total' AND COALESCE(m.message_kind, 'unknown') IN ('unknown', 'deprecated') AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') = '${run_id}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}');

panels.description: Deprecated or unknown ingest kinds observed for the selected run.

list.name: run_id
list.label: Run
list.definition: SELECT __value, __text FROM ( SELECT 0 AS sort_key, '__none__' AS __value, 'Select run_id...' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS sort_key, r.run_id AS __value, CONCAT(r.run_id, ' • ', COALESCE(l.status, r.status, 'unknown'), CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.bot_id, '') <> '' THEN ' • ' || r.bot_id ELSE '' END) AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs r LEFT JOIN portal_bot_run_lifecycle l ON l.run_id = r.run_id WHERE COALESCE(r.run_id, '') <> '' ) t ORDER BY sort_key, __text DESC;
list.query: SELECT __value, __text FROM ( SELECT 0 AS sort_key, '__none__' AS __value, 'Select run_id...' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS sort_key, r.run_id AS __value, CONCAT(r.run_id, ' • ', COALESCE(l.status, r.status, 'unknown'), CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.bot_id, '') <> '' THEN ' • ' || r.bot_id ELSE '' END) AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs r LEFT JOIN portal_bot_run_lifecycle l ON l.run_id = r.run_id WHERE COALESCE(r.run_id, '') <> '' ) t ORDER BY sort_key, __text DESC;

list.name: series_key
list.label: Series
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT series_key AS __value, series_key AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_view_state WHERE series_key <> '__run__' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') = '${run_id}' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT series_key AS __value, series_key AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_view_state WHERE series_key <> '__run__' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') = '${run_id}' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: component
list.label: Component
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT component AS __value, component AS __text FROM ( SELECT component FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(run_id, '') = '${run_id}' UNION SELECT component FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 WHERE COALESCE(run_id, '') = '${run_id}' ) t WHERE COALESCE(component, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT component AS __value, component AS __text FROM ( SELECT component FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(run_id, '') = '${run_id}' UNION SELECT component FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 WHERE COALESCE(run_id, '') = '${run_id}' ) t WHERE COALESCE(component, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: failure_mode
list.label: Failure
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT failure_mode AS __value, failure_mode AS __text FROM ( SELECT failure_mode FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(run_id, '') = '${run_id}' UNION SELECT failure_mode FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 WHERE COALESCE(run_id, '') = '${run_id}' ) t WHERE COALESCE(failure_mode, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT failure_mode AS __value, failure_mode AS __text FROM ( SELECT failure_mode FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(run_id, '') = '${run_id}' UNION SELECT failure_mode FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 WHERE COALESCE(run_id, '') = '${run_id}' ) t WHERE COALESCE(failure_mode, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

title: BotLens Per-Run Deep Dive
